MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Compel Deposition Testimony, Production Of Documents, And Interrogatory Responses From Thomas Walsh Jr. is taken off calendar per the moving party. Judge Pro Tem: Sanford Kingsley, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Interrogatory Responses, Production Of Documents And Deposition Testimony
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Danielle Ribera of Ribera Law Firm telehone number 415-576-1600 for Plaintiff.
Ilya Frangos of Galine, Frye & Fitting telephone number 650-345-8484 for Plaintiff.
Rebecca Bers of Office of The City Attorney telehpone number 415-554-4224 for Defendant City and County of San Francisco.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Interrogatory Responses, Production Of Documents And Deposition Testimony is granted. Sanctions in the amount of $300.00 against Plaintiff Thomas Walsh. No sanctions to the Attorney. The Parties are to prepare a joint order.

Judge Pro Tem: William Shapiro. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Interrogatory Responses, Production Of Documents And Deposition Testimony

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jill Lin, of Ribera Law Firm, Tel. 415.576.1600, for plaintiffs;
Rebecca A. Bers, of the Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3800, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: RIBERA LAW FIRM'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS THOMAS WALSH, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR THOMAS WALSH, JR. is denied without prejudice, to be raised with new set of facts. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Harold Kahn; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/HK)
